name: Dino running from a FURRY: GAMESFORFARM
short_description: Run, Dino, run! You can't fall into the clutches of Mr. Furry
detailed_description:
Run, Dino, run! You can't fall into the clutches of Mr. Furry

Dino running from a FURRY: GAMESFORFARM is a game in which you have to run away from a big and dangerous furry, collecting coins and achieving new records along the way! What will happen if he catches up with you - it's better not to even know...

Game genre - runner

Game features:
- Nice and colorful graphics
- 2.5D runner that will definitely surprise you with its gameplay
- various unpredictable obstacles on your way
- Character customization, over 10 different types of clothing to diversify your wardrobe

Collect as many coins as possible and set the highest record
